ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the loan application was submitted */,
  "final_date" TEXT /* Final date of the loan (maturity date) */,
  "employment_length" INTEGER /* Length of employment in years */,
  "home_ownership" TEXT /* Home ownership status (e.g., RENT, OWN, MORTGAGE) */,
  "income_category" TEXT /* Income category (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the applicant */,
  "loan_amount" REAL /* Amount of the loan */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term of the loan (e.g., 36 months, 60 months) */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of loan application (e.g., INDIVIDUAL, JOINT) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan (e.g., credit_card, car, small_business) */,
  "interest_payments" TEXT /* Interest payment category (e.g., Low, High) */,
  "loan_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the loan (e.g., Good Loan, Bad Loan) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate of the loan */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the loan (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "dti" REAL /* Debt-to-income ratio */,
  "total_payment" REAL /* Total payments received for the loan */,
  "total_principal_recovered" REAL /* Total principal recovered for the loan */,
  "recoveries" REAL /* Recoveries made on the loan */,
  "installment" REAL /* Monthly installment amount for the loan */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the loan was issued */,
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the applicant */,
  "co_applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the co-applicant (if applicable) */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan (e.g., Active, Paid Off, Defaulted) */,
  "next_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next expected payment */,
  "last_payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payment received */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the applicant */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the applicant */,
  "employment_company" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "residential_address" TEXT /* Residential address of the applicant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the applicant */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the loan record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the loan record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the loan record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the loan record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_purpose FOREIGN KEY ("purpose") REFERENCES loan_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_condition FOREIGN KEY ("loan_condition") REFERENCES loan_conditions ("condition_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_grade FOREIGN KEY ("grade") REFERENCES loan_grades ("grade_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_co_applicant_id FOREIGN KEY ("co_applicant_id") REFERENCES applicants ("applicant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_term FOREIGN KEY ("term") REFERENCES loan_categories ("category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., credit_card, car, small_business, 36 months, 60 months) */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., purpose, term) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_grades" (
  "grade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grade */,
  "grade_name" TEXT /* Name of the grade (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "grade_description" TEXT /* Description of the grade */,
  "grade_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the grade (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition (e.g., Good Loan, Bad Loan) */,
  "condition_description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "condition_risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the loan condition (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "applicants" (
  "applicant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each applicant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Applicant's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Applicant's last name */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Applicant's date of birth */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Applicant's social security number */,
  "residential_address" TEXT /* Applicant's residential address */,
  "email" TEXT /* Applicant's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Applicant's phone number */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Applicant's employment status */,
  "employment_company" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Applicant's annual income */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Applicant's credit score */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the applicant record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who last updated the applicant record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the applicant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the applicant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("applicant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* User's username */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* User's role (e.g., Loan Officer, Risk Analyst, Compliance Officer) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* User's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* User's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
